# Metrics
JVM Metrics should appear in the corresponding dashboard.
--
dcs_activemq_health_percent (x)
dcs_activemq_up_time_ms (x)
--
dcs_activemq__queue_size (x)
dcs_activemq_blocked_average_time_ms (x)
dcs_activemq_enqueue_max_time_ms (x)
dcs_activemq_in_flight_count (x)
--
Total / per Broker
enqueue_count (x/x)
dequeue_count (x/x)
-- 
connections_count_total (x)
current_connections_count (x)
brokers_count (x)
consumer_count_total (x)
consumer_count (x)

For markdown syntax help: [commonmark.org/help](https://commonmark.org/help/)
